units.content: each inference step receives a marker of one of at least two structurally distinguishable forms based on its convergence-status annotation
markers are propagated along edges of a graph whose nodes are admissible operational-mechanism identifiers, subject to a per-hop decay factor and a fixed hop-count limit
a collision event is detected at any shared identifier where markers from two or more distinct inference steps coincide above a threshold
the collision event is classified as an opening-collision, crack-collision, or bridge-collision according to the forms of the contributing markers
